name: ERPNext Stock V2 Linked Invoice Delivery Note Cancel Test

parameters.dataJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ customer_name: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.customerName, customer_type: "Company", customer_group: "Individual", territory: "Vietnam" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ item_group_name: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.itemGroup, parent_item_group: "All Item Groups", is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.warehouseName, parent_warehouse: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.parentWarehouse, company: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.itemCode, item_name: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.itemCode, item_group: $node["Create Linked Item Group"].json.name, stock_uom: "Unit", is_stock_item: 1, is_purchase_item: 1, is_sales_item: 1, valuation_rate: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.rate, standard_rate: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.rate }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Receipt", company: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.postingDate, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Linked Item"].json.name, t_warehouse: $node["Create Linked Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.receiptQty, basic_rate: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.rate }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ customer: $node["Create Linked Customer"].json.name, company: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.postingDate, set_warehouse: $node["Create Linked Warehouse"].json.name, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Linked Item"].json.name, warehouse: $node["Create Linked Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.deliveryQty, rate: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.rate }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ customer: $node["Create Linked Customer"].json.name, company: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.postingDate, due_date: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.dueDate, debit_to: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.accounts.receivable, remarks: `${$node["Build Linked Context"].json.runId} linked invoice from Delivery Note`, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Linked Item"].json.name, qty: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.deliveryQty, rate: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.rate, income_account: $node["Build Linked Context"].json.accounts.sales, delivery_note: $node["Create Linked Delivery Note"].json.name, dn_detail: $node["Get Linked Delivery Note"].json.items[0].name }] }) }}
